ddls:
CREATE TABLE "football_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each football program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the football program */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference affiliation of the program */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of the institution */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Number of football players enrolled */,
  "enrollment_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of football players to total enrollment */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the program was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assistant coach */,
  "recruitment_budget" REAL /* Annual budget for recruitment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the program's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_football_programs_assistant_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_football_programs_head_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_football_programs_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "number_of_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the conference */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of national championships won by the conference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the conference's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the player is associated with */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of eligibility */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "recruited_by" INTEGER /* Coach who recruited the player */,
  "recruitment_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was recruited */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_recruited_by FOREIGN KEY ("recruited_by") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the coach */,
  "alma_mater" TEXT /* Alma mater of the coach */,
  "recruitment_budget" REAL /* Annual budget for recruitment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the coach's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program playing the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was home or away */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the game's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program offering the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of scholarship (e.g., Athletic, Academic) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the scholarship in years */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the scholarship starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the scholarship ends */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the scholarship is renewable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scholarship's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarships_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment statistics */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment for that year */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Number of football players enrolled that year */,
  "enrollment_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of football players to total enrollment */,
  "male_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "international_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Spring Game, Alumni Day) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the fan supports */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fan */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the fan */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the fan */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the fan */,
  "fan_since_year" INTEGER /* Year the fan became a fan */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fan's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program receiving the sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring organization */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sponsorship */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the sponsorship in years */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the sponsorship starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the sponsorship ends */,
  "renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sponsorship is renewable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sponsorship's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES football_programs ("program_id")
)
